item.title: If you're feeling down, here is something for you
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: The wages of sin are death. Or possibly $696.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: No kings in America TYVM
item.description:
I didn't get to go to the protest, but I did get to serve breakfast to a lot of dope humans headed to the one in our area. I still want to show my solidarity by at least contributing to the usersub flood of the best signs I've seen shared so far. The Navy I joined on June 14, 2011 was not a Navy that represented a country of fascism. I am so happy I do not have to serve under this draft-dodging clown who has the audacity to call our U.S. veterans suckers and losers.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
No. It shouldn't be.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) wants to see change.
NSFW (I'll post the uncensored version in the comments, but be warned.)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: I was the only one! Got a lot of F yous here in the south… my sign said “trump is a dump” haha, hopefully I did my part?

item.title: This is Feminism! The sign says: “Please observe the Islamic hijab.” Brave Iranian woman: No!

item.title: What a great group.
item.description: I remember a pride parade many years ago where the dykes on bikes would swarm to where protestors were to drown them out with revving their bikes.

item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Cake Day
item.description:
I don't have anything in particular to share. I guess I'll look through the oldest downloads on my phone. They are not old, since I remove photos to laptop regularly.
Just trying to find a few that aren't something you chronically online degens have seen in the last week.
Which is why I started in oldest, so it isn't ones I stole in the last week.
some lni horror too
Checking zillow when looking to buy feels like an unintentionally masochistic activity.
oh right, I used to post eclectic mixes. They seemed to end up well-recieved.
Daycore also exists.
I do this too.
The internet is for cats.
It is worse when garlic bread is better than sex.
btw I don't fancy a shag. I saved this bcause I thought it was hilarious.
Check the dates
item.dc:creator: laserfrog

item.title: Happy Pride Everybody!
item.description: Traveled to meet a friend today and take them to their first pride parade, was a blast :D Hope you all are having a great weekend! Also, excited for the handful of folks in the comments who are about to realize I am trans whenever I make it obvious like this on Imgur lol ;P

item.title: Small Town NC, No Kings!
item.description: You don't need your sound on, I'm just proud of my people. No Kings!

item.title: Saying goodbye to Imgur. It's what's best for my mental health.
item.dc:creator: SerialSeb

item.title: Pallas's Kittens Getting Braver By The Hour!
item.description: First Pallas's Kittens of 2025! On March 31st, four tiny Manuls were born to Altana and Fellini at La Torbiera Zoo in Italy! Just recently, the little ones started venturing out of their den under their mom's watchful eye. And yesterday they came right up to the glass! #caturday #awesome #animals #aww #cute

FUCK ICE
LQBTQ+ RESIST!!! Love, Your friendly neighborhood Trans Chick =^.^= ?

item.title: My contribution for today
item.description:
Miami’s speaking out in this heat.
Shoutout to The Plantain. Miami’s version of The Onion.
Everyone stay safe today…..and hydrated.
A lot of humor, talent and immigrants in Miami.
Kudos for all the safe protests across the country (and the globe)
This one didn’t hit home. I’m partial to bald men. ( not Miller)
Gotta include The Office!
This one ☝️
God bless our veterans.
We’re the 305
A lot of talent
item.dc:creator: ShereeAnderson

item.title: ICE facility protest - Portland
item.description: Protesters have created an encampment outside the ICE facility and there have been people there 24/7 for about a week. It’s mostly been normal cop shit (rubber bullets, tear gas, pepper balls) and really escalated the last couple days They’re pointing actual guns at protesters, and according to the comments on the reel, people who were there said they were aiming them at people’s heads. BORTAC is there (border patrol tactical unit, deals with counterterrorism and stuff like that). They’re up on the roof shooting less lethals down at protesters. The amount of tear gas they’re using has caused someone to miscarry. Green gas was also used. It’s not tear gas. It’s highly toxic and they used it back in 2020 on BLM protesters too. Here’s an article from 2020 about it https://archive.is/x7ybw The most striking effects of zinc chloride toxicity in the street — vomiting, burning skin, coughing — are only the first onslaught of a chronic, unpredictable respiratory condition that can cause severe liver damage, fatigue, weight loss, and anorexia, in addition to difficulty breathing. Defense Technologies, an imprint of Pennsylvania-based security equipment manufacturer Safariland, markets the HC canisters as “military-style” smokers, even though the U.S. military actually stopped using HC in grenades in the 1990s due to its extreme toxicity.
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: For a state as red as this one is i only expected a few dozen
item.description: But there were hundreds. Super proud Fairbanks for that. Not gonna post pics because I'm paranoid about the already dangerous surveillance state we live in. I mean, democratic politicians are being assassinated.
item.dc:creator: IMSALTYRICK

item.title: Do you think he is mad?
item.description: Knowing that Putin did it better. Seriously look at this low turnout and absolutely quiet crowd. I'm proud of everybody abroad for showing solidarity with Americans who do not want to be under the rule of this tyrant. As a disabled combat veteran who served in the United States Army. I'm was not okay with this.
